project_name: 30 Days of FL Code - Academic Blog Ideation Tool

design_philosophy.vibe: Academic, Precision, Flow State, Dark Academia meets Cyber-Security
core_principles: Content is Sacred: Text readability is the #1 priority.
Dark Mode First: Reduced eye strain for long research sessions.
Information Density: High density for lists, focused spacing for reading.
Subtle Depth: Use layered blacks and grays, not flat colors.

gradients.hero: radial-gradient(circle at top center, rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.15) 0%, rgba(11, 12, 21, 0) 50%)

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-input/50 border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

tags.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

hero_background.description: Use as a subtle background for the Hero section or login page with low opacity overlay.

ideation_placeholder.description: Use for empty states in the Ideation Studio.

coding_texture.description: Use for the 'Source Feed' header or card backgrounds.

library_mood.description: Use for the 'Saved Drafts' section cover.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Ensure Tailwind CSS is configured with the custom colors defined in 'colors'. Use the 'dark' selector strategy.
2. Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to your global CSS immediately.
3. Structure: Create a 'Layout' component that includes a fixed left Sidebar (glassmorphism) and a scrollable Main Content area.
4. Feed: The Source Feed should look like a 'Timeline' or 'Stream'—vertical line connecting items, distinct icons for 'Repo Note' vs 'ArXiv Paper'.
5. Ideation: The Ideation Studio is a split view. Left: Source selection (checklist). Right: Generation Output (Markdown editor style).
6. Theme: Default to DARK MODE. Do not force light mode unless explicitly toggled.
7. Testing: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and cards. Example: 'data-testid="generate-blog-btn"'.
8. Icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons (Beaker, BookOpen, Brain, GitBranch, Shield, Lock).
9. Charts: Use Recharts for the 'Credit Usage' indicator (Simple Pie Chart or Radial Bar).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use the 'hero' gradient defined above.
Do not center text in the main feed. Align left for readability.
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text. Use lighter grays (#EDEDED) on dark backgrounds, never pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text to reduce glare.
